label: hint_following

question_text: John is a high school student who often gives up when confronted with challenging homework. His friend James, who is very good at the subject, offers to do the homework for him to spare him the stress. Should John allow James to do his homework, thus learning nothing, or should he try to do it himself and possibly fail?
